content.en:
The Origin Black Clay is very light, and the ball of Origin Black Clay that Ye Tian just obtained is at most 100 grams.

But that's just the beginning.

He continued to search for the Origin Black Mud, and as time passed, the Origin Black Mud, he gradually found more and more.

"The tidal period of the Origin Black River lasts for a maximum of ten primeval epochs, and during these times, it may not be possible to find much Origin Black Mud!"

Ye Tian is also not very demanding, and he can find out how much is how.

this day.

Somewhere in the Origin Black River, Ye Tian saw an incomparably huge black giant bear, and the other party was fighting with a black giant whale.

"Origin Black Whale!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

And that black giant bear was obviously an Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor, belonging to the Eternal True Beast Clan.

Their strength has all reached the top Origin Lower Realm level, and their strength is quite strong.

Abrupt.

Another Origin Black Whale appeared, besieging the black giant bear.

In desperation, the black giant bear naturally chose to escape.

In the blink of an eye, the black giant bear disappeared, and the two Origin Black Whales did not catch up.

"Two Origin Black Whales, if they are killed, then you can get a large amount of Origin Whale Oil!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

So, he went over and fought the two Origin Black Whales.

Rumble!!!!!

The golden body on the other side is fully open!

On the other side, the Endless Golden Arm of the Supreme Technique was unleashed, holding the Origin Rule Weapon and constantly fighting with the two Origin Black Whales.

The strength of the Origin Black Whale is extremely terrifying, and the defense is also very strong, but the means are still single, and it is not Ye Tian's opponent.

Soon, the two Origin Black Whales were injured.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian kept fighting with them, killing from one area to another.

Gradually, the two Origin Black Whales couldn't bear it anymore.

"Die!"

Ye Tian exerted the Endless Golden Arm to the extreme, holding the Origin Rule Weapon Spear, and stabbed it fiercely, directly piercing through one of the Origin Black Whales.

And the other Origin Black Whale gathered a black pillar of light and directly hit Ye Tian's body.

At this moment, Ye Tian seemed to be injured a lot.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian fought with another Origin Black Whale and killed it as well.

Just as he collected the two Origin Black Whales and was about to leave.

The black bear reappeared.

"Hahaha, this brother, you seem to be seriously injured, these two Origin Black Whales are better for me!"

The black bear said with a smile.

He never stayed away, and when he saw another Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor fighting with two Origin Black Whales, he hid in the shadows and peeked.

He had to admit that Ye Tian was very demonic, not only had he cultivated a complete golden body on the other side, but he had also created the supreme technique on the other side, this kind of genius was definitely a strong person that could only be cultivated by a top overlord force in the central region.

Even if his cultivation reached the pinnacle of the Origin Realm, he was also a genius at the other side, and he would definitely not be able to defeat Ye Tian.

But now, he saw that Ye Tian's injuries were not light, and he had to withstand the impact of the Origin Black River, and his body was almost unstable.

He knew that his opportunity had come, and he obtained two Origin Black Whales in one go, and he was naturally unwilling to let go of such a good opportunity.

Ye Tian stared at this black giant bear, judging from the results of the copying talent exploration, this should be called the Lord of the Bear Vortex.

In fact, he had already used his copying talent to sense that the other party was back, and deliberately hid his strength to fight with these two Origin Black Whales, pretending to be injured.

If this bear whirlpool is going to attack and kill him, he will kill him easily, so that there is no psychological burden.

After all, if he was asked to kill this Lord of the Bear Vortex for no reason, he would still be reluctant to do so, unless the other party had a conflict with the territorial sea boundary or the human race.

But now, he has no contradictions with this lord of the bear whirlpool.

But now it's different, this guy wants to snatch his origin black whale, then he's welcome.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Get out, it's you who should get out!" the Lord of the Bear Vortex slammed into the ground with a large black stick.

Seeing that the Lord of the Bear Vortex had made a move, Ye Tian no longer kept his hand.

He burst out with a terrifying aura all over his body, where is the weakness just now!

At the same time, a new spear gradually appeared in his hand.

This is not an Origin Rule weapon, but a treasure from the other side.

The moment the Lord of the Bear Vortex saw the treasure on the other side, he shivered.

"The treasure of the other side!"

He knows very well the power of the treasure on the other side, this is a legendary weapon!

Many of the Origin Middle Realm and other shore-level geniuses of his forces did not have the Origin Treasure of the Other Shore, and Ye Tian had cultivated a Origin Treasure of the Other Shore.

This guy shouldn't be the heir of a top-notch Origin Upper Realm existence, he can't think of anything other than this reason!

And now, it's not a question of how to save his life when he thinks about it.

"Misunderstanding!"

The Lord of the Bear Vortex hurriedly shouted.

However.

Ye Tian didn't spare the slightest.

The golden body on the other side is fully open!

Endless Golden Arm is fully open!

The rules of the other side of the origin and the other side of the origin all exploded, and they merged into the other side of the treasure spear.

Then he stabbed him hard.

No matter how many defenses the Lord of the Bear Vortex used, he pierced them all with a single shot.

Poof!

The body of the Lord of the Bear Vortex was pierced, and everything that saved his life was destroyed.

However, he is not dead.

Apparently it is the role of these life-saving things.

However, this only delayed his death, and did not save his life at all.

"Spare my life, I am a member of the Central Xuanlong Mountain, for the sake of the face of Xuanlong Mountain, don't kill me!"

The Lord of the Bear Vortex begged for mercy.

Xuanlong Mountain?

Ye Tian hadn't heard of it.

The central part is too big, and there are many forces comparable to Fengya Island, and he has not gone deep into the central part, and he does not know much about the many forces in the central part, so naturally he has not heard of Xuanlong Mountain.

Of course.

He could roughly guess that Xuanlong Mountain was definitely not weak, perhaps stronger than Fengya Island.

But so what?

He killed the Lord of the Bear Vortex, and the powerhouses of Wind Tooth Island could not know about it.

Countless spears shrouded the Lord of the Bear Vortex, and under the attack again and again, his life-saving things were completely useless.

In an instant, the Lord of the Bear Vortex fell and died.

After killing the Lord of the Bear Vortex, Ye Tian checked the treasure on his body.

"Lots of good stuff!"

Ye Tian tidied up a little, and found the origin black mud, which was about a few catties.

"Not bad!"

Ye Tian smiled, this is an unexpected gain!

Subsequently.

He processed the traces here, and directly took the two heads of Origin Black Mud and left.

In the blink of an eye, some years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian found a grotto at the bottom of the Heihe River.

This grotto at the bottom of the river is able to resist the power of the tides to a certain extent, and he also senses the presence of some creatures here. ~
